description: HTML source for a web-based database viewer interface, including styling and scripting for dynamic database and table browsing.

methods.name: fetchData
methods.description: Generic utility function for fetching data from a provided URL and returning parsed JSON.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches list of available databases from backend API and populates the database list in the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes and reloads the list of databases, resetting the current state.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses a database in the sidebar, loading its tables when expanded.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Loads and displays tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and displays data for a selected table from the backend API.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Constructs the HTML for the data table, including headers and rows.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses long or object cell content for better readability.
